verification_probe_result.note: 249,459 rows already have owner_flow_address from a prior partial backfill. ETL pipeline fix ensures all future rows will populate. Full backfill to ~97% requires BQ credentials not available in this build environment.

backfill_log_summary: BQ credentials not available in build environment (.env.local contains only Supabase keys). ETL code fixes are correct and will take effect on next scheduled sync. Full backfill command: ETL_BACKFILL_START=2024-01-01 node scripts/etl/bq-backfill-historical.mjs --tables=moments
